HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (TRANSACTION ID # 76457735) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC HEARING SET FOR JUL-17-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO JULY-17-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PORFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARGARET VALENCIA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS EXCESSIVE EXPENSES FOR CLOTHING, TRANSPORTATION, ENTERTAINMENT, AND FOOD AND ORDERS THAT $800 PER MONTHLY PAY PERIOD MAY BE GARNISHED UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. IN ADDITION, THE FUNDS ON HOLD WITH THE CONTRA COSTA COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER SIGNED. CERTIFIED COPIES TO BE SERVED ON THE PARTIES. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF PORFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Judgment debtor Margaret Valencia's claim of exemption is granted in part and denied in part. The court determines that judgment debtor has excessive expenses for clothing, transportation, entertainment, and food and orders that $800 per monthly pay period may be garnished until the judgment is satisfied. In addition, the funds on hold with the Contra Costa County Sheriff's Office shall be released to the judgment creditor.

Order signed. Certified copies to be served on the parties.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
